name: XP Inc. Class A Common Stock
description: XP Inc is a Cayman Island-based technology-driven financial services platform. It is a provider of low-fee financial products and services in Brazil. The company evaluates its business through a single segment such as monitoring operations, making decisions on fund allocation, and evaluating the performance. It generates revenue through the Brokerage commission. Geographically, the company derives maximum revenue from Brazil and also has its presence in other countries.
